facilities.title: Mona Elder Care | Nursing Home in Taman Bunga Raya Kuala Lumpur
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mona Elder Care operates a network of nursing homes across the Klang Valley and Peninsular Malaysia under a consistent brand and clinical identity. The Taman Bunga Raya branch is one of at least four Mona Elder Care locations in Kuala Lumpur, alongside homes in Pandan Perdana (the group's main branch), Taman P. Ramlee Setapak, and Lembah Jaya Ampang. The operator positions itself as an affordable mid-tier nursing home brand rather than a premium home, aimed at families seeking professional nursing care at a more accessible price point. The branch carries 5.0 stars from 3 Google reviews — a perfect but very small community sample that reflects limited public visibility rather than a comprehensive assessment of care quality.

Mona Elder Care publishes six care service categories on its website at monaeldercare.com: Senior Citizens Care (long-term residential), Post-Operative Recovery Care, Stroke and Coma Care, Handicapped Care, Respite Care, and Day Care. The group accepts residents with significant medical complexity — including those recovering from stroke, in comatose states, or with permanent physical disabilities — giving it a broader clinical scope than many mid-market nursing homes. Mona Elder Care provides 24/7 care. Pricing is not posted on the operator website; contact the group directly for a written quote.

The Taman Bunga Raya branch's specific address is not prominently listed on the Mona Elder Care website — the group's central contact number covers all branches and is the best starting point to confirm location, bed availability, and current room rates. With only 3 Google reviews, a personal visit and conversations with current resident families will give a far more reliable picture of day-to-day care quality than the online record alone. Ask about nursing staffing schedules, which clinical conditions can be managed on site, and confirm the JKM registration certificate is displayed during your viewing.

facilities.title: Mona Elder Care | Nursing Home in Taman P Ramlee, Setapak
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mona Elder Care's Setapak branch operates at 57, Jalan Teratai 2 in Taman P. Ramlee, Setapak — a quiet residential road in Kuala Lumpur's northern suburbs. The Setapak branch is one of four Mona Elder Care locations in the Klang Valley, alongside homes in Pandan Perdana, Lembah Jaya Ampang, and Taman Bunga Raya. The operator positions itself as an affordable mid-tier nursing home brand providing professional care at an accessible price point. It carries 4.8 stars from 9 Google reviews — a positive score on a modest but more substantive sample than some other Mona branches.

Mona Elder Care publishes six care service categories on its website at monaeldercare.com: Senior Citizens Care (long-term residential), Post-Operative Recovery Care, Stroke and Coma Care, Handicapped Care, Respite Care, and Day Care. The group accepts residents with significant medical complexity — including those recovering from stroke, comatose patients, and residents with permanent physical disabilities — giving it a broader clinical scope than many mid-market nursing homes in KL. Mona Elder Care provides 24/7 care. Pricing is not posted on the operator website; call the group directly to request a written fee schedule.

The Taman P. Ramlee address places this branch within Setapak, northern KL — accessible for families in Setapak, Wangsa Maju, Gombak, and Kepong. With 9 reviews at 4.8 stars, the review trail is limited but positive; reading the individual comments will give you the most useful picture of daily care experience. Ask about available room types, overnight nursing staffing, and the full care package for your relative's specific medical situation. Confirm the JKM registration certificate is displayed at the facility.

facilities.title: Mona Elder Care | Nursing Home in Jalan Sri Kemuning Lembah Jaya Selatan Ampang
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mona Elder Care's Ampang branch is situated at 2, Jalan Sri Kemuning, Lembah Jaya Selatan, 68000 Ampang — a residential pocket just south of the main Ampang town corridor, with reasonable road access to Hospital Ampang and the broader Ampang–Cheras clinical network. It is one of four Mona Elder Care locations in the Klang Valley, sharing a brand, clinical identity, and service menu with the group's Pandan Perdana, Setapak, and Taman Bunga Raya branches. The Ampang branch carries 4.7 stars from 15 Google reviews — the most reviewed location in the Mona network in our directory.

Mona Elder Care publishes six care service categories on its website at monaeldercare.com: Senior Citizens Care (long-term residential), Post-Operative Recovery Care, Stroke and Coma Care, Handicapped Care, Respite Care, and Day Care. The group accepts residents with significant medical complexity — including stroke and coma patients and those with permanent physical disabilities. Mona Elder Care provides 24/7 nursing coverage across its branches. Pricing is not posted on the operator website; contact the group directly for a written fee schedule tailored to your relative's care needs.

With 15 reviews at 4.7 stars, the Ampang branch has the most substantive review record in the Mona network. Reading the full comment trail before your visit will give the clearest picture of staff responsiveness and day-to-day care character. The Lembah Jaya Selatan location is most accessible for families in Ampang, Cheras, and Pandan Indah. Ask about room types and availability, what clinical interventions are managed on site, and confirm the JKM registration certificate is displayed during your visit.

facilities.title: Mona Elder Care | Nursing Home in Pandan Perdana
facilities.editorial_summary:
Mona Elder Care's Pandan Perdana branch — located at No. 32, Jalan Perdana 1/4, Pandan Perdana, 55300 Kuala Lumpur — is the group's main branch and primary contact point for the Mona Elder Care network. Pandan Perdana sits in the Cheras-adjacent zone that straddles the KL-Selangor boundary, providing good access to the hospital infrastructure in both Cheras and Ampang. The branch carries 4.5 stars from 17 Google reviews — the highest review count among the Mona network's KL locations.

Mona Elder Care publishes six care service categories on its website at monaeldercare.com: Senior Citizens Care (long-term residential), Post-Operative Recovery Care, Stroke and Coma Care, Handicapped Care, Respite Care, and Day Care. The group accepts residents with significant medical complexity — including stroke and coma cases and residents with permanent physical disabilities. This breadth of clinical scope positions Mona Elder Care as a network for residents who need more than basic assisted living. The operator provides 24/7 care. Pricing is not posted on the website; call 014-688 7358 for a fee schedule.

As the main branch, Pandan Perdana is where the Mona Elder Care group's administrative and operational centre sits. With 17 reviews at 4.5 stars, this location has the widest review base in the network — reading the comments will give you a realistic picture of care quality and staff character. Families in Pandan Perdana, Cheras, Ampang, and eastern KL will find this the most accessible Mona location. Ask about room availability, care packages for high-dependency residents, and confirm the JKM licence certificate is on display.

facilities.title: Woodrose Senior Residences
facilities.editorial_summary:
Woodrose Senior Residences at Lorong Hillview 2D, Taman Sri Ukay, Ampang is the newest and described as the most premium facility in the Woodrose network — a departure from the group's Shah Alam campus model into the Ampang–Ulu Kelang corridor. Woodrose Senior Residences Sdn Bhd emerged from the merger of Zara Aisyah Care Centre (ZACC) and MLL Sdn Bhd and operates the Seksyen 11 and Seksyen 13 Shah Alam homes alongside this Ampang location. The branch carries 4.4 stars from 8 Google reviews.

Woodrose Senior Residences operates on a Shariah-compliant framework governed by an in-house Ustaz who oversees SOPs covering food, cleanliness, daily activities, and spiritual guidance — one of the few nursing homes in Malaysia with institutionalised Shariah governance rather than simply halal catering. Care services documented on the operator's website at woodrose.com.my include Memory Care for residents with dementia and Alzheimer's, Day Care for those with early-stage cognitive decline, and round-the-clock medical care from trained clinical staff. Care fees are not published on the operator website; contact the group directly for pricing and availability.

The Ampang location at Taman Sri Ukay draws from the Ampang, Ukay Perdana, and Ulu Kelang residential clusters — a catchment distinct from the Shah Alam branches. For Muslim families in this part of the Klang Valley who want a Shariah-governed nursing environment, Woodrose is among the most established options in the region. Gender intake policy for the Ampang branch should be confirmed directly with the operator, as the Shah Alam homes are gender-segregated. Confirm the JKM registration certificate is displayed during your visit.

facilities.title: Woodrose Senior Residences 1 Seksyen 11 (Female - Syariah Complaint)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Woodrose Senior Residences 1 is the female wing of the Woodrose Healthcare campus in Seksyen 11, Shah Alam, located on Jalan Silat a short distance from the male Residence 2 on Jalan Gamelan. This is the earlier of the two Seksyen 11 homes and is exclusively for female residents. It features 2-bedded and 4-bedded rooms alongside a swimming pool used for hydrotherapy — an amenity uncommon in residential nursing homes. Operated by Woodrose Senior Residences Sdn Bhd, the facility carries 3.9 stars from 26 Google reviews.

Woodrose Senior Residences operates on a Shariah-compliant framework governed by an in-house Ustaz overseeing SOPs for food, cleanliness, daily activities, and spiritual guidance — one of the few nursing homes in Malaysia with institutionalised Shariah governance rather than simply halal catering. Care services on the operator's website at woodrose.com.my include Memory Care for residents with dementia or Alzheimer's, Day Care for those with early-stage cognitive decline, and round-the-clock medical care from trained clinical staff. Care fees are not published on the operator website; contact the group for pricing.

With 26 reviews at 3.9 stars, Residence 1 has the most substantial review record among the Woodrose branches and a score that is lower than some family expectations. Reading the full comment trail before your visit will give you the clearest picture of specific concerns and what has improved since. The Seksyen 11 Shah Alam campus is well located for families in Shah Alam, Klang, and Subang. Ask about current availability in 2-bed vs 4-bed configurations, what is included in the monthly rate, and whether hydrotherapy sessions are part of the standard care package.

facilities.title: Woodrose Senior Residences 2 Seksyen 11 (Male - Syariah Compliant)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Woodrose Senior Residences 2 is the male wing of Woodrose Healthcare's Seksyen 11 campus in Shah Alam, Selangor, situated on Jalan Gamelan adjacent to the female Residence 1 on Jalan Silat. Together, the two Seksyen 11 buildings form a gender-segregated campus that is one of the more established Shariah-compliant nursing home operations in the Klang Valley. Woodrose Senior Residences Sdn Bhd emerged from a merger of Zara Aisyah Care Centre (ZACC) and MLL Sdn Bhd. The male wing carries 4.2 stars from 26 Google reviews.

Woodrose Senior Residences operates on a Shariah-compliant framework governed by an in-house Ustaz who oversees SOPs for food, cleanliness, daily activities, and spiritual guidance across all residences. Care services published on the operator's website at woodrose.com.my include Memory Care for dementia and Alzheimer's residents, Day Care for those with early-stage cognitive decline, and 24-hour medical care from trained staff. Pricing is not published on the operator website; contact the group for a written fee schedule.

With 26 reviews at 4.2 stars, Woodrose 2 has a comparable review profile to Residence 1 — reading both review trails together will give you the fullest picture of the Seksyen 11 campus experience. The Shah Alam Seksyen 11 location is practical for families in Shah Alam, Klang, Subang Jaya, and western Petaling Jaya. Male residents requiring a Shariah-governed care environment with proximity to the female wing for spouse or sibling co-residency will find this the most relevant Woodrose option. Confirm the JKM licence certificate is displayed during your visit.

facilities.title: Woodrose Senior Residences 3 Seksyen 13 (Female - Syariah compliant)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Woodrose Senior Residences 3 is a female-only, Shariah-compliant residence in Seksyen 13, Shah Alam — a separate facility from the Seksyen 11 campus, providing a third location option within the Woodrose network. The branch is operated by Woodrose Senior Residences Sdn Bhd, which emerged from the merger of Zara Aisyah Care Centre (ZACC) and MLL Sdn Bhd. It carries 5.0 stars from 5 Google reviews — a perfect score on a very small community sample that reflects its newer status within the network.

Woodrose Senior Residences operates on a Shariah-compliant framework governed by an in-house Ustaz who oversees SOPs for food, cleanliness, daily activities, and spiritual guidance — one of the few nursing home operators in Malaysia where Shariah compliance is institutionally structured rather than limited to halal catering. Care services on the operator's website at woodrose.com.my include Memory Care for residents with dementia and Alzheimer's, Day Care for those with early-stage cognitive decline, and round-the-clock medical care from trained clinical staff. Pricing is not published; contact the group directly.

The Seksyen 13 location is a short distance from the Seksyen 11 campus, giving the Woodrose network a concentrated Shah Alam footprint that families visiting from the west Selangor catchment can access in one trip. With only 5 reviews, the public track record for this branch is limited; a personal visit and direct conversations with staff and current residents' families will be more informative than the online record alone. Ask about room configuration, care package pricing, and confirm the JKM registration certificate is on display during your viewing.

facilities.title: Elderlove Living Care Centre (Puchong)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Elderlove Living Care Centre's Puchong branch occupies ground-floor shophouse units in Skypod Square on Persiaran Puchong Jaya Selatan, Bandar Puchong Jaya — a commercial podium development with straightforward carpark access and proximity to the major road network serving Puchong, Subang Jaya, and the Klang Valley highway system. The Puchong branch is one of two Elderlove nursing home locations in our directory, alongside the Sungai Long branch in Kajang. Elderlove was founded in 2016 by Dr. CS Lim, a consultant nephrologist who transitioned from specialist medicine into elderly care. The branch carries 5.0 stars from 15 Google reviews.

Elderlove Living Care Centre provides daily living assistance, medical supervision, and post-surgery recovery, supported by 24/7 staffing. The group operates on a philosophy that prioritises senior dignity and individual autonomy alongside clinical care — a framework developed from Dr. Lim's background in specialist medicine. Elderlove also runs Missi Care, a home nursing and caregiver service arm established in 2017, allowing the group to offer continuity across residential and home-based care. Further details on service scope and pricing are available on the operator's website at elderlove.my.

Skypod Square's commercial setting provides easy vehicle access and covered parking, making regular family visits less logistically complicated than bungalow-conversion nursing homes where parking can be limited. With 15 reviews at 5.0 stars, the Puchong branch has a strong and consistent community rating. Reading the individual reviews before your visit will give the clearest picture of care character and staff engagement. Ask about current bed availability, the range of medical conditions managed on site, and request a written monthly fee schedule.

facilities.title: Elderlove Living Care Centre (Sg.Long)
facilities.editorial_summary:
Elderlove Living Care Centre's Sungai Long branch is located at No. 11 Jalan Budiman, Budiman Business Park, Bandar Sungai Long, Kajang — a light-industrial business park setting accessible from the SILK Highway in the Kajang–Cheras corridor. The Sungai Long location is the second Elderlove nursing home in our directory alongside the Puchong branch. Elderlove was founded in 2016 by Dr. CS Lim, a consultant nephrologist whose specialist background in renal medicine shapes the group's clinical orientation and attention to medically complex residents. The branch carries 4.1 stars from 31 Google reviews.

Elderlove Living Care Centre provides daily living assistance, medical supervision, and post-surgery recovery, supported by 24/7 staffing. The group operates on a philosophy that prioritises senior dignity and individual autonomy alongside clinical care. Dr. Lim's nephrology background is relevant for families with relatives on dialysis or with renal conditions — worth asking about specifically when you enquire. The group also operates Missi Care, a home nursing and caregiver service arm. Further details are available at elderlove.my.

With 31 reviews at 4.1 stars, the Sungai Long branch has the most substantive review base of the two Elderlove locations, reflecting a wider range of family experiences than the Puchong branch's smaller sample. Reading the full review trail — particularly comments that describe specific care events or staff interactions — will give a more nuanced picture than the aggregate score. The Budiman Business Park setting serves families in Sungai Long, Balakong, eastern Cheras, and Kajang. Ask about current bed availability, clinical capabilities for high-dependency residents, and request a written fee schedule.

facilities.title: Green Acres Elderly Care Centre Managed By Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd.
facilities.editorial_summary:
Green Acres Elderly Care Centre, operated by Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd., has been providing residential nursing care in Johor Bahru since 1998 — making it one of the longest-established private nursing homes in southern Malaysia. The main branch sits at 50, Jalan Bukit Kempas 4/3 in Taman Bukit Kempas, a residential hillside neighbourhood about 20 minutes from central JB via the EDL highway. A second care site operates at Jalan Intan in Kim Teng Park. The group's bungalow-style premises give both locations a genuinely domestic feel. The branch carries 4.8 stars from 4 Google reviews.

Green Acres Elderly Care Centre provides 24-hour nursing care for the aged and physically disabled. The group has been operating under the Green Acres brand since the 1990s and runs the facility under Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd. The operator's website is greenacreshome.com. Specific clinical capabilities — including whether the facility accepts fully bedridden residents, manages tube feeding or catheterisation, or offers physiotherapy — are best confirmed directly with the operator, as service scope is not prominently detailed on the website.

The Taman Bukit Kempas location is a 20-minute drive from central JB and is most practical for families in the Kempas, Skudai, Taman Johor Jaya, and Tebrau corridors. With only 4 Google reviews, the public record is thin; a personal visit and conversations with current resident families will provide a more reliable assessment of day-to-day care quality than any online source. Ask about bed availability, pricing, which clinical conditions can be managed, and confirm the JKM registration certificate is displayed on site.

facilities.title: Green Acres Home Care Centre- Managed By Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd.
facilities.editorial_summary:
Green Acres Home Care Centre is operated by Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd., the same company that runs the Green Acres Elderly Care Centre at Jalan Bukit Kempas 4/3 in Taman Bukit Kempas, Johor Bahru. The home care arm extends the group's residential care services — which it has been providing since the 1990s — into community-based and home-delivered care for elderly Johor Bahru residents. The facility does not carry a published Google rating in our records. The operator's website is greenacreshome.com.

Green Acres Residence Care (Group) Sdn. Bhd. provides 24-hour nursing care at its residential site in Taman Bukit Kempas, with a second location at Jalan Intan in Kim Teng Park. The home care arm's specific service scope — including whether it provides caregiver placement, skilled nursing visits, wound care, or post-discharge support — is not prominently detailed on the operator's website and should be confirmed directly when you enquire. Bed count and pricing are not publicly posted.

For Johor Bahru families looking for a home care or transitional care option with a connection to an established residential provider, the Green Acres group offers continuity between settings — the same operator manages both the residential home and the home care arm, which can simplify handovers and care planning. Contact the group via greenacreshome.com or the facility's published number to confirm current service availability, geographic coverage, and fee structure. Ask about the JKM registration status of the home care arm on your initial call.
